pitchEn: A private two-factor authentication (2FA) app that generates TOTP/HOTP/Steam one-time codes and keeps all secrets in an encrypted, biometric-locked vault on your device. Add accounts by scanning a QR code, pasting an otpauth:// link, entering keys manually, or importing from Aegis and Google Authenticator, and export everything as QR images in a .zip.
newFeaturesEn: First release: encrypted local 2FA vault with TOTP/HOTP/Steam codes, QR/manual/Aegis/Google Authenticator import, biometric unlock, and duplicate detection.

dataHandling.notes: All 2FA secrets are stored in an encrypted on-device vault; nothing is sent to any server. Camera is used only to scan otpauth QR codes. No login, no network.

reviewerRemarksEn: No account or sign-in is required. On first launch pick a language and create a master password, which encrypts the local vault. Tap the + button and choose 'Scan QR code' (grant camera permission when asked) or 'Enter manually' to add a test account, then view the rotating 6-digit code on the list screen. All data stays on the device.
